content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding a  param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py that applies a chain of string->string functions before encoding. Will touch tiktoken/core.py, primarily the encode() method. Let me know if you're touching the same file/method.

agent2: I've already added a 'transformers' param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py (applied right at the top of encode(), before the allowed_special/disallowed_special logic). Since you're adding return_positions=True to the same method's signature, please add your param after mine in the signature and be careful merging - my patch is only in my own working copy, not shared, so you'll need to apply your changes independently in your own copy. I'm done with my changes and about to write patch.txt.
